description: OverCR consolidated regression test suite — v1.0.0

tests.name: approval_boundary
tests.description: PypER approval boundary: 51 assertions, 15 phases

tests.name: governance_bypass
tests.description: PypER approval bypass: defense-in-depth across 3 enforcement layers

tests.name: rejection_loop
tests.description: Rejection loop + abandonment: 3 revision cycles, 24 assertions

tests.name: malformed_packet
tests.description: Malformed packet validation: L1 rejection + recovery paths

tests.name: direct_subagent_routing
tests.description: Direct subagent routing sovereignty: L1+L5 rejection, state machine blocks

tests.name: doctrine_conflict
tests.description: Governance override L5 pattern: 15 phases, catches bypass claims

tests.name: cold_start_reconstruction
tests.description: Cold-start reconstruction: 66 assertions, 5 phases, filesystem truth

tests.name: audit_integrity
tests.description: Audit integrity: 17 assertions, tamper detection, cross-reference verification

tests.name: live_coder_worker
tests.description: Live CodER worker: happy path, malformed, timeout, governance, exit code, audit

tests.name: live_knower_worker
tests.description: v0.2.1 worker framework: KnowER, healthcheck, replay, registry, caps

tests.name: model_router
tests.description: Model router: basic routing, subagent/task-type override, fallback, validation

tests.name: model_policy_violations
tests.description: Routing policy violations: downgrade, sovereignty, minimum class

tests.name: audit_integration
tests.description: Audit integration: policy violation logging to audit trail

tests.name: knower_claim_review
tests.description: KnowER claim review: 6 phases, claim classification, source quality, governance, malformed rejection

tests.name: knower_myth_fact
tests.description: KnowER myth/fact: 5 phases, classification, source quality, governance, malformed rejection

tests.name: cryer_worker
tests.description: CryER v0.4.0 worker: 6 packet types, live validation, edge cases, governance boundary

tests.name: knower_inference_mode
tests.description: KnowER inference mode: mock adapter, governance enforcement, deterministic fallback, L5/L6 validation, audit metadata

tests.name: output_sanitizer
tests.description: Output sanitizer: deterministic JSON extraction from model output (code fences, preamble, prefixes, trailing text)

tests.name: hermes_cli_adapter
tests.description: HermesCLIAdapter: factory, availability check, dry run, live inference (if Hermes CLI available)

tests.name: real_inference_v043
tests.description: v0.4.3 E2E: real Hermes inference → sanitizer → KnowER packet → L1-L6 validation, with raw+sanitized audit trail

tests.name: cryer_real_inference
tests.description: CryER v0.5.0 inference: L1-L6 validation, 7 packet types, governance rules, L5/L6 enforcement, deterministic fallback

tests.name: coder_patch_plan
tests.description: CodER v0.6.0 patch plan: inference happy path, deterministic fallback, approval_required enforcement, forbidden shell rejection, governance override rejection, direct subagent routing rejection

tests.name: pyper_execution_plan
tests.description: PypER v0.7.0 execution plan: valid plan, valid refusal, governance override rejection, direct routing rejection, shell chain rejection, curl|bash rejection, pip install rejection, fake receipt rejection, deterministic fallback, privilege escalation rejection

tests.name: workflow_graph
tests.description: Workflow Graph DAG model: node/edge validation, cycle detection, sovereignty, packet type compatibility, serialization, factory methods (15 tests)

tests.name: workflow_runner
tests.description: Workflow Runner orchestration: KnowER->CryER, CryER->PypER, CodER->PypER execution, validation failure, policy violation, approval gates, audit trace, replay, deterministic fallback (12 tests)

tests.name: workflow_policy
tests.description: Workflow Policy governance: node execution, edge handoff, approval gates, retry limits, deterministic fallback, content safety, full workflow check (36 tests)
